ui_evidence.notes: Disclaimer row uses flex icon+text; Group_info_banner_ applied without explicit IR style_ref on group
IR style_ref Icon_primary_; implementation uses Icon_muted_ with Lock lucide icon

critiques.finding: Log and edit popup cancel buttons (ai_RNbBHXmw, ai_RNbBHXnU) use Button_ghost_ variant; IR style_ref maps both to Button_outline_.
critiques.alternative: Apply bubbleStyle('Button_outline_') and matching shadcn outline variant on cancel CTAs to match Bubble button styling.

critiques.finding: Disclaimer icon ai_RNbBHXmr resolves to Icon_primary_ in IR but renders with Icon_muted_ and a generic Lock lucide glyph.
critiques.alternative: Resolve Bubble icon asset/name from drsam-99657.bubble and apply Icon_primary_ token for parity with the info-banner row.

critiques.finding: EditRelapsePopup delete (ai_RNbBHXnQ) fires immediately with no confirmation — destructive one-click removal, consistent with EditMilestonePopup but unlike journal entry delete AlertDialog.
critiques.alternative: Add AlertDialog confirm before deleteRelapseEvent to reduce accidental data loss.
